name: studio.create_post
description: Create a new blog post on an Actium Studio site. Post is created as a draft; publish via studio.publish_post.
whenToUse: Content-ops flow drafts a new blog post from outside copy (Notion, Google Docs, etc.).
Automated republishing: convert a newsletter issue or long-form memo into a blog post.
First half of 'draft and schedule' flow — create now, publish_post with scheduled_at later.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants to edit an existing post — use studio.update_post; create_post fails on slug collision.
Caller is authoring a static page (/about, /pricing) — use studio.create_page; posts and pages are distinct.
Categories or tags not yet defined on the site — create_post will fail referencing unknown taxonomies; create them first.
